note: Starting comprehensive research on AI voice and audio generation tools as of March 2026

ElevenLabs leads quality; Fish Audio leads multilingual flexibility; PlayHT cross-language cloning in 140+ languages. API pricing: OpenAI TTS-1 at 5/1M chars, Inworld at 0/1M chars.
Suno v5 with Studio DAW, 0/mo Pro, 0/mo Premier. Udio at 0/mo. Both settled major RIAA lawsuits with Warner, Universal. Suno launching licensed models.
ForgeFoley launching Q1 2026. Adobe Firefly Audio with audio prompting. AudioX, MMAudio.net. AI tools transforming creative workflows.
Kokoro (82M params, Apache 2.0, commercial use ok). XTTS-v2 (Coqui, 17 languages, non-commercial only). StyleTTS2 high quality. Chatterbox #1 trending on HuggingFace.
12 US states with voice cloning laws. Tennessee ELVIS Act. AI Transparency and Voice Rights Act adopted early 2026 requiring disclosure. Lehrman v Lovo Inc key case.
RIAA sued both; Warner and Universal settled with Udio with licensing deals. WMG settled with Suno. UMG v Suno still in discovery. Germany GEMA ruling expected June 2026.
OpenAI merged audio teams targeting Q1 2026 launch. ElevenLabs Eleven v3 released Feb 2026. OpenAI developing screenless audio hardware with Jony Ive. VC invested .6B in voice AI in 2025.

summary: Conducted 14 web searches covering all major AI voice/TTS tools, voice cloning, AI music generation, sound effects/foley, open source options, pricing, legal landscape, and 2026 developments.
